problems.cause: AGREE requires constant declarations to be evaluatable at compile time, but the expression (ownLongitude > nearestIntruderLongitude) references input ports which are not compile-time constants
problems.minimal_edit: Replace the constant declaration with a boolean variable declaration that can be evaluated within the AGREE context

executor_steps: Replace 'const ownAircraftGoesUpOnTie : bool = (ownLongitude > nearestIntruderLongitude);' with 'variable ownAircraftGoesUpOnTie : bool = (ownLongitude > nearestIntruderLongitude);' in the AGREE annex block
